creator: nicholas.h.briggs@gmail.com
text: Confirmed by the Emscripten developers - the issue I am running into is because the llvm-devel package (the only llvm package providing clang-devel that emscripten needs) on FreeBSD 14.1 has advanced past what the current emscripten package (3.1.69) is capable of dealing with.  Emscripten 3.1.71 or later is needed to cope with the more recent llvm-devel.
